context: Tests whether the agent correctly applies file-splitting conventions when a skill domain is complex enough to warrant it: SKILL.md stays under 100 lines, a separate REFERENCE.md (or equivalent) holds detailed docs, and the Advanced features section in SKILL.md links out rather than embedding detail.

checklist.name: Separate reference file exists
checklist.description: A separate file (REFERENCE.md or similar) exists in the skill directory containing the detailed domain documentation

checklist.name: SKILL.md links to reference
checklist.description: SKILL.md contains a link or explicit reference to the separate detailed file (e.g. 'See REFERENCE.md' or a markdown hyperlink)

checklist.name: References one level deep
checklist.description: SKILL.md does NOT link to files more than one level deep (no links to files inside subdirectories of the skill folder unless via scripts/)

checklist.name: Advanced features section
checklist.description: SKILL.md contains an 'Advanced features' section (or equivalent) that points to the separate file rather than embedding advanced content inline

checklist.name: Quick start section
checklist.description: SKILL.md contains a 'Quick start' section covering the common-path workflow

checklist.name: Description has Use when
checklist.description: The frontmatter description includes 'Use when' with specific trigger conditions

checklist.name: Third-person description
checklist.description: The frontmatter description is written in third person

checklist.name: No time-sensitive info
checklist.description: Neither SKILL.md nor REFERENCE.md contains time-sensitive data (specific dates, current rates, version-specific API details)

checklist.name: Concrete example present
checklist.description: At least one concrete worked example appears somewhere in the skill files
